query:
SELECT 
  r.id, r.product_name as activityTitle, r.booking_date as scheduledDate,
  r.people as numberOfPersons, r.customer_name as clientName,
  r.status, ro.op_status as opStatus, ro.client_confirmed as clientConfirmed,
  ro.monitor_id as monitorId
FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = r.id
WHERE r.booking_date >= '2026-03-23' AND r.booking_date <= '2026-03-29'
  AND r.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'failed')
ORDER BY r.booking_date, r.id;

FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = r.id
WHERE r.booking_date >= '2026-03-23' AND r.booking_date <= '2026-03-29'
  AND r.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'failed')
